## Principal subjects

Vishal Chakravarty is the Founder and CEO of NovaPharm Healthcare Ltd. His work and writing cover pharmaceutical entrepreneurship, product and market strategy, UK–EU market access, manufacturing and CMO selection, technology transfer, specialist medicines, sourcing, supply and commercial route-to-market design.

This file is a supplemental navigation aid for services that choose to read it. Canonical HTML pages, structured data, the sitemap and public company and publication sources remain authoritative.

Public facts JSON: https://vishal.novapharmhealthcare.com/facts.json
